candidate_definition_hints.text: This development quick start template is heavily inspired by [Georgios's template](https://github.com/gakonst/dapptools-template). Over time it was migrated to use [foundry](https://github.com/gakonst/foundry) since dapptools was deprecated.

source_context_snippet: This development quick start template is heavily inspired by [Georgios's template](https://github.com/gakonst/dapptools-template). Over time it was migrated to use [foundry](https://github.com/gakonst/foundry) since dapptools was deprecated.
